trends.headline: Roommate charged with two counts of murder in death, disappearance of two USF students
trends.summary: A roommate faces two murder charges after a missing USF doctoral student and his girlfriend vanished earlier this month, authorities said.

trends.headline: A sudden shift: ICE arrests drop nearly 12% after Minneapolis killings and immigration shake-up
trends.summary: After a sweeping immigration crackdown filled Minneapolis streets with masked agents, arrests have fallen sharply following deadly incidents and leadership upheaval.

trends.headline: US still delivering weapons to Ukraine, Zelenskyy says, as Prince Harry visits Kyiv
trends.summary: Zelenskyy says U.S. weapons shipments continue as Ukraine ramps up strikes on Russian targets during Prince Harry’s visit.

trends.summary: The latest Framework Laptop 13 Pro is an ultraportable device that's both modular and premium. But is there a market for it?

trends.summary: The Terramaster D1 SSD enclosure is built for speed, but it can also survive anything you (or Mother Nature) throw at it.

Cybersecurity researchers have discovered a new Lua-based malware created years before the notorious Stuxnet worm that aimed to sabotage Iran's nuclear program by destroying uranium enrichment centrifuges.

trends.summary:

trends.headline: Feds say Hawaii crime boss orchestrated his own death to shield millions in assets
trends.summary: A federal judge signaled he would allow some civil discovery to proceed in the government's bid to seize the late crime boss Michael Miske's $20 million fortune.

trends.headline: Judge grounds flyers’ attempt to undo Alaska-Hawaiian airlines merger
trends.summary: Alaska Airlines bought out Hawaiian Airlines in 2024, which a group of customers claimed had increased flight costs and reduced services in violation of antitrust laws.

trends.headline: Fifth Circuit unblocks Texas immigration law
trends.summary: The ruling is the latest in a long-running battle over a Texas law permitting state and local law enforcement to arrest people for immigration violations and empowering state judges to issue deportation orders.

trends.headline: Feds yet to return vehicle Renee Good was shot and killed in
trends.summary: The Honda Pilot reportedly remains shrink-wrapped and unexamined in an FBI storage facility.

trends.headline: Solderless RGB LED Clips guide
